name: Creeping Dusk
short_description: Creeping Dusk is a tower defense game. Build a town around an abandoned gold mine and defend against monsters that swarm the area. Fortify your defenses, and prepare for the increasingly challenging nights. Will you be able to protect your town from the encroaching darkness?
detailed_description:
Step into the eerie world of Creeping Dusk, a tower defense game that blends strategic base-building and intense battles against waves of undead. Your task is to build a small town around an abandoned gold mine and defend against monsters that swarm the area. Plan your next move during the day, explore surrounding area, expand the town, fortify your defenses and prepare for the increasingly challenging nights.

After each night’s battle, choose from a variety of rewards, such as blueprints for new buildings, resources and bonuses. Discover what hides in the heavy fog around the gold mine to get advantages in battle. Gain XP and earn upgrade points to increase your chances of survival.
